title: Accounts Executive|Leadership Opportunity
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented and hands-on Senior Accounts Executive to manage full-spectrum accounting, finance, and related HR administrative functions. This role requires strong technical accounting knowledge, high integrity, and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Handle daily accounting operations including AP/AR, vendor invoice verification, invoicing, bookkeeping, bank reconciliations, and banking matters

  • Prepare and submit timely management reports, project P&L, cash flow planning and forecasts, annual budgets, and other financial reports

  • Liaise with tax agents on tax computation, filing, reporting, and payments to relevant authorities

  • Ensure financial reports comply with Group policies, local accounting standards, and regulatory requirements

  • Monitor and follow up on AR collections, AP payments, loan repayments, and operating expenses

  • Assist in project financing applications, including preparation of project cash flows and required documentation for banks

  • Control and monitor intercompany transactions, trade and non-trade AR/AP, cash flow, and balance sheet items

  • Manage day-to-day HR and administrative operations, including license and compliance matters

  • Maintain accurate employee records, manage Employment Pass applications, and prepare monthly HR reports

  • Prepare payroll and ensure compliance with MOM, CPF, and IRAS regulations

  • Coordinate with company secretary on corporate and statutory matters

  • Liaise with auditors and support statutory audit processes

  • Perform ad-hoc duties and special assignments as required

Requirements

  • Diploma in Accountancy / Finance or equivalent qualification

  • Relevant accounting and finance experience

  • Proficient in MS Office and Accounting Software

  • Able to work independently with minimal supervision

  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills

Why Join Us

  • Stable role with broad exposure across finance, tax, audit, and HR functions

  • Opportunity to work closely with senior management, and leadership experience

  • Long-term career growth

    Business Edge Personnel Services Singapore 

    EA License No: 96C4864 

    EA Personnel Reg No: R26159908 (Tan Ying Ying)
